base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of king_lorik_idle — a character (npc) from 1986 dragon quest. King Lorik of Tantegel — 4-dir facing. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: King Lorik of Tantegel — 4-dir facing; typically found on throne-dais, not walking. Issues quest to Hero at game start
